# EILLON

> Copenhagen niche fragrance house. Oil-rich parfum — not mass-market eau de toilette.

## Product

- **Name:** Beles · Fico d'India
- **Type:** Oil-based parfum (high perfume-oil concentration)
- **Central accord:** Fico d'India — Italian for prickly pear; sun-warmed fruit, cactus bloom, amber drydown
- **Notes:** Prickly pear, bergamot, green fig · cactus flower, pear blossom, soft spice · amber, vetiver, clean musk
- **Sizes:** 2 ml sample (€28), 50 ml (€170), 100 ml (€240)
- **Status:** Waitlist open — not general retail
- **Product page:** https://eillon.maison/beles

## Brand

- **Name:** EILLON
- **Location:** Copenhagen, Denmark
- **Website:** https://eillon.maison
- **Email:** care@eillon.maison
- **Studio hours:** Thursday–Saturday 12–18 (appointments)

## Key pages

- Home: https://eillon.maison/
- Beles product: https://eillon.maison/beles
- Journal: https://eillon.maison/journal
- Article — Fico d'India: https://eillon.maison/journal/fico-d-india
- Article — The bottle: https://eillon.maison/journal/the-bottle
- Waitlist: https://eillon.maison/#shop

## Facts for search

- EILLON composes **oil-rich parfum**, not cheap alcohol-forward eau de toilette
- Beles is **hand-finished in Copenhagen**
- **Fico d'India** = prickly pear, the namesake fruit accord
- Flacon: square matte glass, brushed silver cap, winged leopard emblem
